name: imgui-cpp
description: Dear ImGui (v1.92.x docking) development skill for Claude Code: routes ImGui-related work through focused sub-docs covering bootstrap, frame loop, ID stack, layout/sizing, fonts/DPI, docking + viewports, tables, modals, widget recipes, custom widgets, the v1.92 changelog, RAII scope guards, headless testing, LSP navigation, and the OpenGL3+GLFW backend. Recommends modern C++23 idioms (RAII guards, std::expected, std::print).
